details.scenario: Verify Web Login Page Render & Header Display
details.steps:
1. Open browser to http://localhost:5173/login
2. Verify "Welcome back" H2 header text
3. Verify Email & Password input fields
details.expected: Page loads with dark void styling, header reads "Welcome back", inputs rendered.
details.actual: Executed successfully and matched expected outcome.

details.scenario: Verify Empty Fields Form Submission Error Toast
details.steps:
1. Click "Sign In" button without entering credentials
2. Inspect error message banner
details.expected: Validation error "Email address and password are required" is displayed.
details.actual: Executed successfully and matched expected outcome.

details.scenario: Verify Malformed Email Input Validation Error
details.steps:
1. Type "user-invalid-email" in #email input
2. Blur field / click Sign In
details.expected: Input displays red border ring and "Please enter a valid email address".
details.actual: Executed successfully and matched expected outcome.

details.scenario: Verify Password Field Masking & Eye Toggle Icon
details.steps:
1. Type "SecretPass123!" in #password input
2. Verify text is masked (bullets)
3. Click Eye toggle icon
4. Verify text revealed
details.expected: Password toggles between obscured input type="password" and visible type="text".
details.actual: Executed successfully and matched expected outcome.

details.scenario: Verify Valid User Login & LocalStorage JWT Storage
details.steps:
1. Enter email "user@mockai.com"
2. Enter password "Password123!"
3. Click Sign In
4. Wait for /app/dashboard redirect
details.expected: POST /auth/login returns 200, JWT saved to localStorage auth-storage, routes to Dashboard.
details.actual: Executed successfully and matched expected outcome.

details.scenario: Verify Redirect to Sign Up Page
details.steps:
1. Click "Don't have an account? Sign up →" link
2. Verify URL changes to /register
details.expected: Navigates to /register page with Full Name, Email, Role, and Password fields.
details.actual: Executed successfully and matched expected outcome.

details.scenario: Verify New Account Registration & Auto Login
details.steps:
1. Fill Name "Jane Candidate", Email "jane@mockai.com", Password "Pass123!"
2. Select Candidate role
3. Click Sign Up
details.expected: Account created, success toast displays "Welcome Jane!", redirects to onboarding.
details.actual: Executed successfully and matched expected outcome.

details.scenario: Verify Forgot Password Modal & Email Recovery Link
details.steps:
1. Click "Forgot?" link
2. Enter "jane@mockai.com"
3. Click Send Recovery Email
details.expected: Toast notification displays "Password recovery email dispatched successfully".
details.actual: Executed successfully and matched expected outcome.

details.scenario: Verify Web Navbar & User Profile Dropdown Display
details.steps:
1. Load /app/dashboard
2. Inspect top navbar brand logo
3. Verify user profile avatar initials "JC"
details.expected: Navbar displays logo, navigation links, and circular profile avatar button.
details.actual: Executed successfully and matched expected outcome.

details.scenario: Verify Overview Metrics Summary Cards (Interviews, Avg Score, Hours)
details.steps:
1. Inspect Dashboard grid
2. Verify 3 metric cards rendered with numerical values
details.expected: Cards render Total Completed Interviews (14), Avg Score (88%), and Practice Time (12.5 hrs).
details.actual: Executed successfully and matched expected outcome.

details.scenario: Verify "Start AI Interview" Action Button Navigation
details.steps:
1. Click "Start AI Interview" card
2. Verify navigation to /app/interview/setup
details.expected: URL changes to /app/interview/setup, Interview Setup screen opens.
details.actual: Executed successfully and matched expected outcome.

details.scenario: Verify "Practice Technical Quiz" Action Button Navigation
details.steps:
1. Click "Practice Quiz" card
2. Verify navigation to /app/quiz
details.expected: URL changes to /app/quiz, Practice Quiz categories render.
details.actual: Executed successfully and matched expected outcome.

details.scenario: Verify Sidebar Link Routing (Jobs, Resume, Sessions, Profile)
details.steps: 1. Click Jobs sidebar link -> 2. Click Resume link -> 3. Click Sessions link
details.expected: Single Page Application (SPA) routing transitions seamlessly without full page reloads.
details.actual: Executed successfully and matched expected outcome.

details.scenario: Verify Recent Activity Feed List Rendering
details.steps:
1. Inspect Recent Activity section
2. Verify latest completed sessions listed
details.expected: List displays session titles, dates, and score badges.
details.actual: Executed successfully and matched expected outcome.

details.scenario: Verify Role & Seniority Dropdown Selection
details.steps:
1. Select "Fullstack Developer"
2. Select "Senior Level"
3. Click "Start AI Session"
details.expected: Selection highlights and initializes session setup context.
details.actual: Executed successfully and matched expected outcome.

details.scenario: Verify WebRTC Camera & Microphone Device Enumeration
details.steps:
1. Enter live interview room
2. Inspect WebRTC media stream container
3. Verify camera video feed
details.expected: Camera feed video element streams live frame and mic amplitude bar responds.
details.actual: Executed successfully and matched expected outcome.

details.scenario: Verify Question Card Display & Text-to-Speech Playback
details.steps:
1. Inspect Question 1 card
2. Verify question text
3. Check speech synthesis controls
details.expected: Question 1 text displays, audio TTS speech synthesis initiates.
details.actual: Executed successfully and matched expected outcome.

details.scenario: Verify Voice Input Speech-to-Text Live Transcript Box
details.steps:
1. Speak response into mic
2. Inspect transcript output box
details.expected: Web Speech API transcribes spoken response into live editable transcript text.
details.actual: Executed successfully and matched expected outcome.

details.scenario: Verify Submitting Answer & Transition to Next Question
details.steps:
1. Click "Submit Answer & Next"
2. Verify Question 2 loads
3. Check progress bar (40%)
details.expected: Progress bar advances to 40%, Question 2 displays.
details.actual: Executed successfully and matched expected outcome.

details.scenario: Verify Finishing Session & AI Evaluation Dashboard Load
details.steps:
1. Submit final question
2. Click "Finish Interview"
3. Wait for AI Evaluation screen
details.expected: AI feedback report loads displaying score metrics (88%), filler word count, and recommendations.
details.actual: Executed successfully and matched expected outcome.

details.scenario: Verify Tech Stack Quiz Category Selection
details.steps:
1. Load /app/quiz
2. Inspect category cards (DS & Algo, React, Node.js, SQL)
3. Click "React UI Frameworks"
details.expected: Category card highlights and loads React Quiz question set.
details.actual: Executed successfully and matched expected outcome.

details.scenario: Verify Radio Option Selection & Next Question Navigation
details.steps:
1. Select Option B radio button
2. Click "Next Question"
details.expected: Selected option highlights blue, advances to next question.
details.actual: Executed successfully and matched expected outcome.

details.scenario: Verify In-Browser Code Challenge Editor Syntax Highlighting
details.steps:
1. Open coding challenge item
2. Type function code in Monaco/CodeMirror editor
3. Click "Run Code"
details.expected: Code executes against test cases, returns "All 3 Unit Tests Passed".
details.actual: Executed successfully and matched expected outcome.

details.scenario: Verify Score Breakdown & Detailed Explanations
details.steps:
1. Complete quiz
2. Click "Submit Quiz"
3. Inspect Results screen
details.expected: Final score (e.g. 90%) displayed with explanation cards for correct/incorrect answers.
details.actual: Executed successfully and matched expected outcome.

details.scenario: Verify Resume Drag-and-Drop File Target Box Display
details.steps:
1. Load /app/resume
2. Inspect drop zone border and "Browse File" button
details.expected: Drop zone displays dashed border with SVG upload icon and file requirements label.
details.actual: Executed successfully and matched expected outcome.

details.scenario: Verify Non-PDF/DOCX File Upload Error Toast
details.steps:
1. Select file "invalid_document.txt"
2. Attempt upload
details.expected: Displays error toast "Invalid file format. Please upload PDF or DOCX".
details.actual: Executed successfully and matched expected outcome.

details.scenario: Verify Valid Resume Upload & ATS Match Score Generation
details.steps:
1. Upload "sample_developer_resume.pdf"
2. Click "Analyze Resume"
3. Monitor progress spinner -> wait for result
details.expected: ATS score card renders score (86/100) with rating badge "Strong Candidate Match".
details.actual: Executed successfully and matched expected outcome.

details.scenario: Verify Skill Tag Extraction & Missing Keywords List
details.steps:
1. Inspect Skills section
2. Verify extracted skills tags and missing keyword recommendations
details.expected: Lists extracted skills (TypeScript, React, Node.js) and missing keywords (GraphQL, Docker).
details.actual: Executed successfully and matched expected outcome.

details.scenario: Verify Keyword Search Bar Input & Filter Execution
details.steps:
1. Load /app/jobs
2. Type "Frontend Lead" into search input
3. Click Search icon
details.expected: Job listings grid updates to show matching job titles.
details.actual: Executed successfully and matched expected outcome.

details.scenario: Verify Work Type Filter Chips (Remote, Hybrid, On-site)
details.steps:
1. Click "Remote" filter chip
2. Verify chip toggle state
details.expected: List refilters dynamically to display remote positions.
details.actual: Executed successfully and matched expected outcome.

details.scenario: Verify Job Card Click & Detail Drawer Slide-Over Modal
details.steps:
1. Click first job card
2. Inspect right slide-over drawer
details.expected: Drawer opens displaying full job description, salary range, and company overview.
details.actual: Executed successfully and matched expected outcome.

details.scenario: Verify 1-Click Resume Application Submission
details.steps:
1. Click "Apply Now" in drawer
2. Confirm selected resume
3. Click Submit
details.expected: Success toast displays "Application Submitted!", button state changes to "Applied".
details.actual: Executed successfully and matched expected outcome.

details.scenario: Verify Session History Table View & Pagination Controls
details.steps:
1. Load /app/sessions
2. Inspect table rows displaying dates, roles, and scores
3. Click Next Page button
details.expected: Table renders historical sessions data and updates table rows on page change.
details.actual: Executed successfully and matched expected outcome.

details.scenario: Verify HTML5 Audio Player Control Bar for Recorded Session
details.steps:
1. Click a session row
2. Click Play button on audio bar
details.expected: Audio player streams recorded interview response and seeker bar advances.
details.actual: Executed successfully and matched expected outcome.

details.scenario: Verify Competency Radar Chart SVG Rendering
details.steps:
1. Inspect Competency Radar Chart section
2. Check polygon SVG element
details.expected: Radar chart plots scores across Technical, Communication, and Confidence axes.
details.actual: Executed successfully and matched expected outcome.

details.scenario: Verify PDF / Excel Report Download Handler
details.steps:
1. Click "Export PDF Report"
2. Verify browser download trigger
details.expected: File download initiates for analysis report document.
details.actual: Executed successfully and matched expected outcome.

details.scenario: Verify User Full Name & Professional Headline Update
details.steps:
1. Load /app/profile
2. Edit Name to "Jane Web Developer"
3. Click "Save Profile"
details.expected: Profile updates instantly, success toast notification displays.
details.actual: Executed successfully and matched expected outcome.

details.scenario: Verify Dark Mode Theme Toggle Switch Execution
details.steps:
1. Click Dark Mode toggle switch
2. Verify <html> class updates to "dark"
details.expected: Theme switches between light and dark void (#09090B) styling.
details.actual: Executed successfully and matched expected outcome.

details.scenario: Verify Account Password Update Flow
details.steps:
1. Open Security tab
2. Enter current password & new password
3. Click Update Password
details.expected: Password update confirmed, session key updated.
details.actual: Executed successfully and matched expected outcome.

details.scenario: Verify User Logout & LocalStorage Session Teardown
details.steps:
1. Click Profile dropdown in navbar
2. Click "Log Out"
3. Verify redirect to /login
details.expected: LocalStorage cleared, user redirected to /login route.
details.actual: Executed successfully and matched expected outcome.

details.scenario: Verify Video Room Camera Grid Layout
details.steps:
1. Load /app/video/room
2. Inspect user camera video element & AI avatar container
details.expected: Dual video grid layout renders candidate video stream and AI interviewer visualizer.
details.actual: Executed successfully and matched expected outcome.

details.scenario: Verify Mute Audio & Stop Video Toggle Controls
details.steps:
1. Click Microphone mute button
2. Click Camera stop button
details.expected: Control bar buttons reflect muted state and pause video stream.
details.actual: Executed successfully and matched expected outcome.

details.scenario: Verify WebSocket Telemetry Connection Status Indicator
details.steps:
1. Inspect connection badge
2. Verify state "Connected (Live Telemetry)"
details.expected: Connection badge displays green indicator for active WebSocket stream.
details.actual: Executed successfully and matched expected outcome.

details.scenario: Verify End Call Action & Summary Modal Display
details.steps:
1. Click Red "End Call" button
2. Inspect call summary modal
details.expected: WebRTC session closes cleanly, call summary modal opens with evaluation link.
details.actual: Executed successfully and matched expected outcome.
